title: rubus fruticosus var. plicatus
intro: Rubus fruticosus var. plicatus, also known as the climbing raspberry or folded raspberry, is a type of bramble plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus fruticosus var. plicatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, high blood pressure, and digestive issues.
